title: 90 Pcs Wooden Dowels Assorted, M6 M8 M10 Wood Plugs Dowel Rods, Woodwork Pins Tapered and Ribbed for Grooved Fluted, Craft, DIY, Carpentry (3 models-90)
features: 【Premium Material】This craft wooden dowels are made from premium solid wood to ensure maximum strength and support is offered and achieved with each use. Our wooden dowels offer the highest levels of performance for our customers.

【Ribbed and Tapered Design】Each dowel is carefully ribbed and tapered during production to standardise the size and fit during use. Ribbed and tapered design of the wood plugs, easy to insert and firmly connect the joints.

【What You Will Get】You will get 90 pcs wood dowels assorted in total in 3 different commonly-used sizes(M6/M8/M10) to help ensure you’ve got a good supply of wooden dowels at your disposal when you need it most, enough for your daily use.

【Wide Applications】Our solid wood dowels are perfect for carpenters, furniture builders, DIY, hobbyists, and are highly useful even just to keep as spares in case any pieces of furniture or wooden frames break and need attention.

【100% Satisfactory Service】The wooden dowels are cylindrical, with a smooth surface, and can be disassembled. If you have any problems when you use our woodwork pins tools, just contact us, we will definitely provide you with satisfactory service.
description: Product Description These wooden dowels boast a versatile design suitable for various applications. With a flawlessly smooth finish, they effortlessly slide into pre-drilled holes, providing a seamless connection between wood pieces. Whether for furniture making, crafts, or DIY projects Made from sustainably sourced wood, our dowels are not only strong. Its sturdy construction ensures reliable structural support, maintaining the integrity of your woodworking projects. Know these pins are both strong and sustainable Our wooden dowels are meticulously crafted with precision to ensure a snug and secure fit for your woodworking projects. Made from high-quality wood, these pins offer exceptional durability and reliability, making them the ideal choice for joining and securing your pieces with ease
